creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221463
patch API usage

Hi,

Looks like the net/libusrsctp update in r561195 causes telegram-desktop to fail to build due to an API change.

the upstream change at [1] added an argument to a callback which causes a failure.

I'm attaching a patch which fixed it for me.

Thanks!


[1] https://github.com/sctplab/usrsctp/commit/3df8f52f44d6a24407112123aa68c6a24e8158f3
